title: Airplane pack MTR (Russian pack) Airbus
description: Airplane pack - a pack added 3D planes for MTR Mod
body:
Airplane pack - a pack that adds Airbus A319, A320 aircraft, Boeing 737 and 777. The pack was made for the MTR mod. This pack requires NTE 0.4.0 and more

Due to the large size of the resource pack, it was divided into aircraft brands, Boeing and Airbus

**Attention! The aircraft of the Airbus A319 model temporarily lack a cockpit, in future versions this will be fixed, as well as when loading aircraft of the Boeing 737 model, the game may hang in the game due to the lack of a model, a solution to this problem is being sought**

This pack contains only Airbus planes flying in Russia.

**UNPACK THE ARCHIVE BEFORE USING IT!**
